LanguageData.MWR_ResonantWarmupStatDescription: This weapon's aiming time after resonance is applied.
LanguageData.MWR_DevGenerateResonanceDescription: Generate or reroll Masterwork Resonance on this item. Works only for Masterwork/Legendary weapon or apparel.
LanguageData.MWR_DevResonanceFailed: Resonance was not applied: the item must be masterwork/legendary and must be a valid weapon or apparel item.
LanguageData.MWR_UnknownResonanceDescription: Unknown resonance. This item may have been created by an older version of the mod.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_MeleeCooldown_Description: Reduces the time between melee attacks.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_MeleeMood_Description: While equipped, this weapon improves the wielder's mood.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_MeleeSkill_Description: While equipped, this weapon increases melee hit chance.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_MeleeDodge_Description: While equipped, this weapon grants a flat bonus to melee dodge chance.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_RangedMood_Description: While equipped, this weapon improves the wielder's mood.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_RangedSkill_Description: While equipped, this weapon increases the wielder's shooting accuracy.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_ApparelMoveSpeed_Description: While worn, this item increases the wearer's movement speed.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_ApparelArmor_Description: Reinforces this item against sharp and blunt damage.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_ApparelDurability_Descriptio: Increases this item's maximum hit points.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_ApparelMood_Description: While worn, this item improves the wearer's mood.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_ApparelToughness_Description: While worn, this item reduces incoming damage.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_ApparelDodge_Description: While worn, this item grants a flat bonus to melee dodge chance.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_ApparelConsciousness_Descrip: Removed resonance. It no longer rolls and has no effect.
LanguageData.MWR_Enchant_ApparelPainReduction_Descrip: While worn, this item reduces the wearer's pain by 1%–20%. Stacks with other Pain-dulling items up to 100%.
